failures.description: The Executor selected the more expensive smartphone from the tool results even though the tool output showed item 5339029584 at $1128.99 was cheaper than item 1507389580 at $1157.86.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was to identify the cheapest available Smartphone. The agent correctly planned and called ProductCatalogSearch with available_only=true, product_type=Smartphone, sort=price_asc. The tool returned two available smartphones sorted ascending by price: item 5339029584 at $1128.99 first, then item 1507389580 at $1157.86. At index 4, the Executor synthesized the answer as item 1507389580 at $1157.86, contradicting the tool output and ignoring the lower-priced first item. This is a misread of relevant tool output, not an invalid tool call, unsupported intent, underspecification, or guardrail/system issue.
